diagrams.title: Exception Chain Structure
diagrams.description: Shows how exceptions are linked together using cause-effect relationship
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how exceptions form a linked list structure with each pointing to its cause

diagrams.title: Multi-Layer Exception Flow
diagrams.description: Demonstrates exception propagation through application layers with chaining
elements: Service Layer: throws BusinessException with SQLException as cause
Controller Layer: throws AppException with BusinessException as cause
Presentation: Catches AppException, prints complete chain
diagrams.purpose: Understand how exceptions bubble up through layers while preserving root cause at each boundary

diagrams.title: initCause and getCause Relationship
diagrams.description: Shows how initCause() sets the cause and getCause() retrieves it
diagrams.purpose: Understand the mechanism of setting and retrieving exception causes
